subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who attained the presence of the Wronged One whilst He was in the hands of the heedless. We bear witness that he departed from the House, turning his face [toward Us] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بلقاء المظلوم اذ کان بین ایدی الغافلین نشهد انه خرج عن البیت مقبلا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
